posts.name: JM San Roman
posts.cooked:
Is it just me and my Mac or is anyone else also experiencing problems when trying to access the wine reviews on their webpage?

I tried using both Safari and Chrome but when I click on a specific wine the page either does not show the review or alternatively it remains “thinking” without eventually delivering the review. The list of wines and vintages comes up fairly ok, but when clicking on one specific vintage to read the review it gets blocked…

It seems to work slightly better on my iPhone but response times at the webpage seem to take forever.

Is anyone else experiencing the same?

posts.name: William Kelley
posts.cooked:
it’s working for me…

if it carries on send me a DM with where you are in the world and we’ll look on the back end

posts.name: Per Svenonius
posts.cooked: I had the same problem last thursday at the time the reviews were posted and 2-3 hours after that. I could see the notes but not the text. Server overload? Never had this problem before.

posts.name: David Bueker
posts.cooked: Working fine for me on PC and mobile right now.

posts.name: Scott McDonald
posts.cooked: I’ve been have the same issue (via Samsung browser on a cellphone), intermittently, the last several days.

posts.name: JM San Roman
posts.cooked: Thank you, William. I will give it one or two more days and then I’ll let you know.

posts.name: Ąņɗŗęŵ Ķļϋǥ
posts.cooked: I hadn’t accessed the site in a minute, so I went to log in this morning and it just timed out the first time. Second time I was able to log in. And then tried to load some reviews and it was timing out as well. It definitely seems like there’s some intermittent server lag issues.

posts.name: Matthew Benjamin
posts.cooked: Agreed, this has been happening over the last few days, on and off

posts.name: J0hn J K@ne
posts.cooked:
William_Kelley:

it’s working for me…

if it carries on send me a DM with where you are in the world and we’ll look on the back end

I was looking sometime over the last few days from my mobile app and couldn’t even log in to see reviews. So may be some rolling technical difficulties. It is resolved for me now and I can log in and access reviews without any delays on mobile.

posts.name: David Cooper
posts.cooked:
It’s a different problem for me. I can’t stayed logged in for very long. When I log back in I have to prove I am not a bot. I hate those check the photos with cars BS.

I also find when using the search feature, it’s best to shorten your search words. Instead of Castello Volpaia Chianti Classico Coltassala, I need to just enter Volpaia and then scroll through all of the wines.

posts.name: Victor Hong
posts.cooked:
Cannot access.
I am still on DSP, after mocking Big Jay Miller for the Sierra CarCrash scandal.

posts.name: D Borczon
posts.cooked: My mobile device is also having trouble with accessing reviews. It is not your imagination. There is an access problem the WA needs to look at

posts.name: Rob Mclaughlin
posts.cooked: I have had this same problem, on and off, on my iPhone accessing via Safari. You click on a review, and it shows as loading for a long time and/or goes to a blank page without the review.

posts.name: William Kelley
posts.cooked: Out tech team is following this thread, so we’re working on it.

posts.name: Dale McClaran
posts.cooked: Just another data point with the same issue of loading a review on my iPad.

posts.name: J Fernandez
posts.cooked: Thank you for sharing those problems. As William says we are working on those instabilities. We’ve issued a fix on Friday and keep monitoring. Thanks again
